data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_COMMON_SHELL_ERROR
data.value: khol mein ek truti thee.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_ADDRESSPROMPT
data.value: upayogakarta naam ya mel pata darj karen:

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_PASSWORDPROMPT
data.value: paas vard darj karen:

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_CONNECTIONFAILED
data.value: {0}: {1} se kanekt karate samay truti

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_CONNECTING
data.value: {0} se kanekt ho raha hai ...

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_AUTHENTICATING
data.value: pramaanit kar raha hai ...

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_COMMAND_LIST_DESC
data.value: sandesh daunalod karata hai aur unhen soocheebaddh karata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_COMMAND_READ_DESC
data.value: ek sandesh kholata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_PAGENOTNUMERIC
data.value: prshth ek sankhyaatmak maan nahin hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_MESSAGENUMNOTZERO
data.value: sandesh sankhya rnaatmak ya shoony nahin ho sakatee hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_MESSAGENUMNOTNUMERIC
data.value: sandesh sankhya ek sankhyaatmak maan nahin hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_MESSAGEVIEW_TO
data.value: - {0} ke lie

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_MESSAGEVIEW_WHEN
data.value: - {0} mein {1} par bheja gaya

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_MESSAGENUMNOTFOUND
data.value: nirdisht sandesh nahin mila hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_COMMAND_CD_DESC
data.value: vartamaan mel nirdeshika ko badalata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_EXCEPTION_CANTOPENMAILFOLDER
data.value: mel foldar kholane mein asamarth {0}: {1}

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_COMMAND_LSDIRS_DESC
data.value: apane mel pate mein nirdeshikaon ko soocheebaddh karata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_IMAPSERVERPROMPT
data.value: imap sarvar pata aur port darj karen (<pata> ya <pata>: [port]):

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SMTPSERVERPROMPT
data.value: smtp sarvar pata aur port (<pata> ya <pata>: [port]) darj karen:

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_COMMAND_SEND_DESC
data.value: ek pate par ek sandesh bhejata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SEND_TARGETPROMPT
data.value: praaptakarta mel pata darj karen:

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SEND_SUBJECTPROMPT
data.value: vishay darj karen:

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SEND_BODYPROMPT
data.value: apana sandesh neeche darj karen. pushti karane ke lie "EOF" likhen.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SEND_SENDING
data.value: sandesh bhejana...

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SEND_SENT
data.value: maisej beja gaya.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SEND_INVALIDMAIL
data.value: amaany eemel pata. sunishchit karen ki aapane pata sahee likha hai aur yah dikhae gae udaaharan ke praaroop se mel khaata hai:

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_COMMAND_RM_DESC
data.value: ek sandesh nikaalata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_COMMAND_RMALL_DESC
data.value: praaptakarta se sabhee sandeshon ko nikaalata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_RMALL_DELETEDNOTINBOX
data.value: {1} se {0} sandesh {2} se hata diya gaya. {3} sandesh paars karane ke lie shesh hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_RMALL_DELETEDINBOX
data.value: inaboks se {0} sandesh {0} hatae gae. {2} sandesh paars karane ke lie shesh hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_RMALL_SUCCESS
data.value: {0} dvaara kie gae sabhee mel saphalataapoorvak hata die jaate hain.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_RMALL_FAILURE
data.value: {0} dvaara kie gae sabhee mel ko nikaalane mein viphal.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SEND_ERRORSENDING
data.value: sandesh bhejane mein truti

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_COMMAND_MV_DESC
data.value: ek sandesh le jaata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_COMMAND_MVALL_DESC
data.value: praaptakarta ke sabhee sandeshon ko le jaata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_MVALL_SUCCESS
data.value: {0} dvaara kie gae sabhee mel saphalataapoorvak sthaanaantarit kar die gae hain.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_MVALL_FAILURE
data.value: {0} dvaara kie gae sabhee mel ko sthaanaantarit karane mein viphal.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_MVALL_DELETEDNOTINBOX
data.value: {0} se {0} sandesh {2} se sthaanaantarit kiya gaya. {3} sandesh paars karane ke lie shesh hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_NEWMESSAGES_NOTIFICATION_TITLE
data.value: {0} nae sandesh inaboks mein aae.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_NEWMESSAGES_NOTIFICATION_DESC
data.value: unhen dekhane ke lie "mail" kholen.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SEND_PATHSFORATTACHMENT
data.value: anulagnakon ke lie fail path darj karen. pushti karane ke lie rikt path par aintair dabaen.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_COMMAND_READENC_DESC
data.value: ek enkripted sandesh kholata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_PGP_KEYPASSWORD
data.value: kunjee aaeedee {0} ke lie paasavard likhen

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_COMMAND_SENDENC_DESC
data.value: ek pate par ek enkripted sandesh bhejata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_MAILDIR_CREATEFAILED
data.value: mel foldar banaane mein asamarth {0}: {1}

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_COMMAND_MKDIR_DESC
data.value: vartamaan kaaryasheel nirdeshika mein ek nirdeshika banaata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_COMMAND_RMDIR_DESC
data.value: vartamaan kaaryasheel nirdeshika se ek nirdeshika nikaalata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_MAILDIR_DIRNOTFOUND
data.value: mel foldar {0} nahin mila.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_MAILDIR_DELETEFAILED
data.value: mel foldar {0}: {1} ko hataane mein asamarth

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_COMMAND_REN_DESC
data.value: ek foldar ka naam badalata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_MAILPREVIEW_NAME
data.value: mel sandesh poorvaavalokan dikhaen

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_MAILPREVIEW_DESC
data.value: mel sandeshon ko soocheebaddh karate samay, nikaay poorvaavalokan dikhaen.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_WEBALERT_OPENING
data.value: url khola ja raha hai... skreen par dikhae gae charanon ka paalan karana sunishchit karen.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPHTTPSFTP_SETTINGS_USERNAMEPROMPT_DESC
data.value: likhen ki aap apane login prompt ko kaise chaahate hain. difolt shailee ka upayog karane ke lie khaalee chhod den. plesaholdars ko paars kiya jaata hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPHTTPSFTP_SETTINGS_PASSWORDPROMPT_DESC
data.value: likhen ki aap kaise chaahate hain ki aapaka paasavard sheeghr ho. difolt shailee ka upayog karane ke lie khaalee chhod den. plesaholdars ko paars kiya jaata hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_USERNAMEPROMPT_NAME
data.value: mel ke lie upayogakarta naam sheeghr shailee

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_PASSWORDPROMPT_NAME
data.value: mel ke lie paasavard sheeghr shailee

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_IMAPPROMPT_NAME
data.value: mel ke lie imap sheeghr shailee

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_SMTPPROMPT_NAME
data.value: mel ke lie esemateepee sheeghr shailee

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_AUTODETECT_NAME
data.value: svachaalit roop se mel sarvar ka pata lagaen

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_DEBUG_NAME
data.value: mel deebag saksham karen

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_MAILNOTIFICATIONS_NAME
data.value: nae mel sandeshon ke lie soochit karen

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_GPGPASSWORDPROMPT_NAME
data.value: mel ke lie gpg paasavard sheeghr shailee

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_SENDIMAPPING_NAME
data.value: imap ping antaraal bhejen

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_SENDSMTPPING_NAME
data.value: esemateepee ping antaraal bhejen

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_TEXTFORMAT_NAME
data.value: mel tekst praaroop

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_IMAPPROMPT_DESC
data.value: likhen ki aap apane imap sarvar ko kaise prompt karana chaahate hain. difolt shailee ka upayog karane ke lie khaalee chhod den. plesaholdars ko paars kiya jaata hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_SMTPPROMPT_DESC
data.value: likhen ki aap apane esemateepee sarvar ko kaise sanket dena chaahate hain. difolt shailee ka upayog karane ke lie khaalee chhod den. plesaholdars ko paars kiya jaata hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_AUTODETECT_DESC
data.value: die gae pate ke aadhaar par mel sarvar ka svachaalit roop se pata lagaen.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_DEBUG_DESC
data.value: mel sarvar deebag saksham karata hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_MAILNOTIFICATIONS_DESC
data.value: kisee bhee nae mel sandesh ke lie aapako soochit karata hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_GPGPASSWORDPROMPT_DESC
data.value: likhen ki aap apane jeepeejee paasavard ko kaise chaahate hain. difolt shailee ka upayog karane ke lie khaalee chhod den. plesaholdars ko paars kiya jaata hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_SENDIMAPPING_DESC
data.value: imap ping bhejane ke lie kitane mileesekand?

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_SENDSMTPPING_DESC
data.value: smtp ping bhejane ke lie kitane mileesekand?

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_TEXTFORMAT_DESC
data.value: niyantrit karata hai ki mel tekst kaise dikhaaya jaega.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_TRANSFERPROGRESS
data.value: mel ke traansaphar...

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_TRANSFERPROGRESS_NAME
data.value: mel sthaanaantaran pragati dikhaen

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_TRANSFERPROGRESSSTYLE_NAME
data.value: mel sthaanaantaran pragati

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_TRANSFERPROGRESSSTYLESINGLE_NAME
data.value: mel sthaanaantaran pragati (ekal)

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_TRANSFERPROGRESS_DESC
data.value: yadi saksham kiya gaya hai, to mel shel dikhaega ki mel daunalod karate samay kitane bait prasaarit hue.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_TRANSFERPROGRESSSTYLE_DESC
data.value: likhen ki aap apanee mel sthaanaantaran pragati shailee kaisee chaahate hain. difolt shailee ka upayog karane ke lie khaalee chhod den. plesaholdars ko paars kiya jaata hai. sthaanaantarit aakaar ke lie {0} aur kul aakaar ke lie {1}.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_TRANSFERPROGRESSSTYLESINGLE_DESC
data.value: likhen ki aap apanee mel sthaanaantaran pragati shailee kaisee chaahate hain. difolt shailee ka upayog karane ke lie khaalee chhod den. plesaholdars ko paars kiya jaata hai. {0} sthaanaantarit aakaar ke lie.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_COMMON_COMMAND_MAIL_DESC
data.value: imap mel klaint kholata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_COMMON_COMMAND_POPMAIL_DESC
data.value: pop3 mel klaint kholata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_POPMAIL_RETURNING
data.value: pop3 mel 0.0.20.0 se vaapas aa raha hai, lekin ham vartamaan mein ise is sanskaran mein jaaree karane kee yojana nahin bana rahe hain. agale sanskaran kee prateeksha karen.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_COMMAND_DETACH_DESC
data.value: diskanekt kie bina shel se baahar nikalata hai

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_MVALL_DELETEDINBOX
data.value: {1} se sandesh {0} ko sthaanaantarit kar diya gaya. paars karane ke lie {2} sandesh shesh hain.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_ATTACHMENTS
data.value: anulagnak:

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_COMMON_SETTINGS_PROMPTPRESET
data.value: prompt preeset

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_ENTRYDESC
data.value: yah anubhaag aapako konfigar karane deta hai ki mel shel kaise kaam karata hai.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_MAXEMAILS_NAME
data.value: ek prshth mein adhikatam ee-mel

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_SETTINGS_MAXEMAILS_DESC
data.value: ek prshth mein kitane ee-mel sandesh pradarshit karane hain?

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_FTPSFTP_FMCLI_KEYBINDING_OPEN
data.value: kholen

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_COMMON_SETTINGS_EXCEPTION_ENTRIESFAILED
data.value: setings pravishtiyaan praapt karane mein viphal.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_COMMON_EXCEPTION_LASTSHELLTYPEMISMATCH
data.value: antim shel yah shel nahin hai jisase alag kiya ja sake.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_EXCEPTION_NOIMAP
data.value: imap sarvar konfigareshan nahin mil sakata

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_EXCEPTION_NOSMTP
data.value: smtp sarvar konfigareshan nahin mil sakata

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_COMMON_COMMAND_MAIL_ARGUMENT_ADDRESS_DESC
data.value: login karane ke lie eemel pata

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_TUI_KEYBINDING_CREATEFOLDER
data.value: foldar banaen

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_TUI_KEYBINDING_MOVE
data.value: le jaen...

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_TUI_KEYBINDING_MOVEALL
data.value: sabhee le jaen...

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_TUI_KEYBINDING_RENAMEFOLDER
data.value: foldar ka naam badalen

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_TUI_KEYBINDING_REMOVEFOLDER
data.value: foldar hataen

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_TUI_KEYBINDING_REMOVE
data.value: sandesh hataen

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_TUI_KEYBINDING_REMOVEALL
data.value: hataen sabhee...

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_TUI_FOLDERMESSAGEOPENFAILED
data.value: foldar ya sandesh nahin khola ja sakata

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_TUI_NEWDIRNAMEPROMPT
data.value: naee nirdeshika ka naam likhen.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_TUI_CREATINGDIR
data.value: nirdeshika banaana...

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_TUI_CREATINGDIRFAILED
data.value: foldar nahin banaaya ja sakata

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_TUI_NEWDIRTOMOVEPROMPT
data.value: is sandesh ko le jaane ke lie ek naee nirdeshika chunen.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_TUI_MOVINGMESSAGE
data.value: sandesh le jaana...

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_TUI_MOVINGMESSAGEFAILED
data.value: sandesh nahin le ja sakata

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_TUI_NEWDIRTOMOVEBYSAMESENDERPROMPT
data.value: ek hee preshak dvaara sabhee sandeshon ko le jaane ke lie ek naee nirdeshika chunen.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_TUI_MOVINGMESSAGEBYSENDER
data.value: preshak {0} dvaara sandeshon ko le jaana...

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_TUI_MOVINGMESSAGEBYSENDERFAILED
data.value: ek hee preshak dvaara sabhee sandeshon ko le nahin ja sakata

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_TUI_NEWDIRNAMERENAMEPROMPT
data.value: naam badalane ke lie naee nirdeshika ka naam likhen {0}.

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_TUI_RENAMINGDIR
data.value: nirdeshika ka naam badalana...

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_TUI_RENAMINGDIRFAILED
data.value: foldar ka naam nahin badala ja sakata

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_TUI_REMOVINGDIR
data.value: nirdeshika hataana...

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_TUI_REMOVINGDIRFAILED
data.value: foldar nahin hata sakata

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_TUI_REMOVINGMESSAGE
data.value: sandesh hataana...

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_TUI_REMOVINGMESSAGEFAILED
data.value: sandesh nahin hata sakate

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_TUI_REMOVINGMESSAGEBYSENDER
data.value: preshak {0} dvaara sandesh hata rahe hain...

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_TUI_REMOVINGMESSAGEBYSENDERFAILED
data.value: ek hee preshak dvaara sabhee sandesh nahin hata sakate

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_COMMAND_ARGUMENT_FOLDER_DESC
data.value: mel nirdeshika naam

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_COMMAND_LIST_ARGUMENT_PAGENUM_DESC
data.value: prshth sankhya

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_COMMAND_ARGUMENT_MAILID_DESC
data.value: sandesh aaeedee

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_COMMAND_ARGUMENT_SENDERNAME_DESC
data.value: preshak ka naam

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_COMMAND_REN_ARGUMENT_OLDFOLDERNAME_DESC
data.value: puraanee mel nirdeshika naam

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_COMMAND_REN_ARGUMENT_NEWFOLDERNAME_DESC
data.value: naee mel nirdeshika naam

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_COMMAND_TUI_DESC
data.value: intaraiktiv mel prabandhan

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_EXCEPTION_OBTAINFAILED
data.value: bataya gaya mail message nahin mila

data.name: NKS_SHELLPACKS_MAIL_EXCEPTION_INBOXOBTAINFAILED
data.value: inbox prapt karna vifal raha
